Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` is clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] New logic has tests in `orbit-core`
- [ ] Frontend/website changes build (`npm run build`) if touched
- [ ] The change keeps Orbit local-first (no telemetry / required account)
